top_signals.title: Yemen's Houthis Threaten New Oil Shock as Civil War Reignites
top_signals.summary: Yemen's Houthi Rebels are threatening to make the global energy crisis worse at the same time that the nation's own energy security is in dire straits. After four years of an unofficial truce and precarious peacetime, Yemen has once again erupted into conflict this week. And this escalating tension comes on the heels of months of threats on the part of the Houthi rebels to fight alongside Iran, potentially making the region's waterways ever more impassable for the global oil trade. Less than half of Yemen's population has access to electricity,…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AG pick Blanche to meet with Epstein survivors after 2 GOP senators hedge on nomination
top_signals.summary: Sen. Thom Tillis, R-N.C., wants Todd Blanche to meet with victims of sex offender Jeffrey Epstein before committing his support for the nomination.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: MegaETH sunsets Mega Mafia accelerator program, noting ‘most’ of its successful apps left
top_signals.summary: MegaETH did not take equity or governance positions in the approximately 20 projects incubated in the Mega Mafia.
